g.text: read spec, status, delete intent, and OCI lifecycle
- subnet and instance-option drift outside the modeled post-
- The modeled post-bind surface stops at display name,
shape, shape config, and tag drift.
- Compartment changes are handled in place before other
- Confirm termination with GetInstance until the resource
reaches TERMINATED or is not found.
OCI state in PROVISIONING, STARTING, STOPPING
unsupported or immutable drift is detected
wait for the spec or live state to change
OCI deletion is confirmed and the finalizer can be removed
